## Category emphasis: documentation project

This is a **documentation / knowledge platform**. Weight your pass accordingly:

- Accuracy first: verify that instructions, commands, paths, and links actually work.
- Fix broken internal/external links and stale references.
- Improve navigation, structure, and headings so readers can find things quickly.
- Tighten prose for clarity and consistency (tone, terminology, formatting).
- Ensure code samples are runnable and match the current tooling versions.
- Prefer many small precise fixes over rewriting whole pages.
